---
title: "Medidas do corpo"
author: "Helena Regina Salomé D'Espindula"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%d/%m/%Y')`"
output: pdf_document
documentclass: article
toc: false
number_sections: false
lang: "pt-BR"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

```

# Medidas do corpo

Data das medidas: 

> Dica: se fizer novas medidas, copie esta pagina e atualize a data.


Ankle circumference & cm & 
Biceps circumference & cm & 
Bust front & cm & 
Bust point to underbust & cm & 
Bust span & cm & 
Chest circumference & cm & 
Cross seam & cm & 
Cross seam front & cm & 
Crotch depth & cm & 
Head circumference & cm & 
Heel circumference & cm & 
High bust & cm & 
High bust front & cm & 
Hips circumference & cm & 
HPS to bust & cm & 
HPS to waist back & cm & 
HPS to waist front & cm & 
Inseam & cm & 
Knee circumference & cm & 
Neck circumference & cm & 
Seat circumference & cm & 
Seat back & cm & 
Shoulder slope &  & 
Shoulder to elbow & cm & 
Shoulder to shoulder & cm & 
Shoulder to wrist & cm & 
Underbust & cm & 
Upper leg circumference & cm & 
Waist circumference & cm & 
Waist back & cm & 
Waist to armpit & cm & 
Waist to floor & cm & 
Waist to hips & cm & 
Waist to knee & cm & 
Waist to seat & cm & 
Waist to underbust & cm & 
Waist to upper leg & cm & 
Wrist circumference & cm &
